description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a beige plastic chassis and a standard rectangular shape. The keycaps are predominantly white and blue, with the blue keys concentrated on the left side, likely for function or modifier keys. The keyboard shows visible signs of wear and damage, particularly on the bottom left and right corners where the casing appears chipped or broken. There is a triangular logo on the top left corner of the keyboard, suggesting a specific brand or manufacturer. The surface of the keyboard is matte with some discoloration and roughness, indicating heavy use or exposure to harsh conditions. The keyboard does not have a visible cable or wireless receiver attached.
description: A full-size beige keyboard with white and blue keys, showing visible damage and wear, especially on the corners. Features a triangular logo and a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, with blue keys on the left and visible damage on the bottom edge.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the blue keys and significant chipping on the bottom left corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the keyboard's length and the extent of damage on both corners.
description_view_3: Right-angled view focusing on the blue keys and the chipped bottom right corner.
